sort_popular_hint: Characters with the most messages of all time
sort_trending_hint: Characters with the most messages this week
sort_trending_24h_hint: Characters with the most messages in the last 24 hours
notifications_denied: Access denied or notifications disabled in system
notification_permission_desc: Allow Glaze to show notifications when generation ends.
hint_generation_settings: Looking for generation settings? You will find them in the chat by clicking the icon
regex_trim_out_placeholder: Globally trims any unwanted parts from a regex match before replacement. Separate each element by an enter.
hint_glossary_drawer: You can also open the Glossary from the
desc_stream: Show response text as it is generated
desc_auto_hide_images: Hide sent images after the specified number of model responses
desc_prompt_cache_ttl: Inject cache_control: ephemeral for OpenRouter/Anthropic. 1 hour keeps cache alive across long pauses (expensive write, cheap read).
desc_omit_reasoning: Don't send reasoning params to API
desc_parse_inline_reasoning: Extracts reasoning from the message body and inserts it into the reasoning block
hint_drag_blocks: Drag blocks by the icon on the left
hint_create_new: Create a new character from scratch
hint_import_file: Import from JSON or PNG (v2 card)
hint_import_janitor: Import a character from JanitorAI or Saucepan using a link
guided_generation_block_hint:
This prompt is sent only when Guided Generation is active.
{{guidance}} — user instruction.
blacklist_warning_desc: {providerName} is a low-quality provider. Support for connection and generation errors will not be provided. Potential issues with aggressive censorship, stability, and response formatting may occur. Please change your provider.
unique_for_chat: Content is unique for each chat
imggen_expand_image_hint: Open the image in fullscreen and view the prompt
api_not_configured: API Not Configured. Please set API Endpoint and Model.
msg_static_block_content: This block is defined by character card, chat history or persona and cannot be modified.
confirm_restore: This will overwrite current data. Continue?
confirm_import_chats: Merge chats from JSON? Existing dialogs with same names will be overwritten.
msg_block_managed_by: This prompt is managed by element
chat_history_anchor_hint: This block marks where chat messages are inserted into the prompt. Drag it to reorder. Depth blocks (Author's Note, Summary) are injected inside it at their specified depth. You can also use {{summary}} and {{lorebooks}} macros in any block's content to inject those at arbitrary positions.
msg_context_limit: Prompt preset exceeds context limit. Please increase Context Size or reduce prompt length.
msg_vector_generation_failed: The embedding model did not respond during generation, so vector lorebook retrieval could not complete.
msg_import_chat_unsupported_format: Unsupported file format. Please use JSONL or .glzchat.json files.
desc_merge_prompts: Combine adjacent blocks into one message
hint_merge_locked: Required by NoAssistant mode — single block
desc_no_assistant: Send all chat history in a single block with role prefixes
desc_stop_string: Sent as stop parameter to the model. Leave empty to omit.
desc_user_prefix: Prefix prepended to user messages in history block
desc_char_prefix: Prefix prepended to character messages in history block
desc_squash_role: Consecutive messages from this role will be merged
onboarding_slide_all_set_desc: You have successfully configured Glaze. Press "Start" to dive into the world of roleplay!
onboarding_slide1_desc: Your ideal companion for roleplay. Forget complex settings — just open the app and start your story.
onboarding_slide2_desc: Connect to an OpenAI-compatible endpoint in a few clicks. Glaze is not just a browser, but a full-featured app for comfortable AI interaction.
onboarding_slide3_desc: Connect your neural network now. Click "Save" to create a preset.
onboarding_slide4_desc: Set up your user profile. This is how characters will know you.
onboarding_slide5_desc: Your secrets stay with you. All chats and characters are stored only on your device. No tracking or hidden sync.
onboarding_slide_chars_desc: Add conversation partners. Glaze fully supports SillyTavern V2 cards (PNG and JSON).
onboarding_slide_import_desc: If you have a backup from Tavo, SillyTavern or Glaze, you can restore it now.
onboarding_feature_imggen_desc: Naistera integration: create visual images of characters with reference support directly in chat.
onboarding_feature_glossary_desc: Your handbook for technical terms. Available in menu and quick access for instant reference.
onboarding_feature_custom_desc: Set up the look for yourself: dark and light themes, custom backgrounds, and fonts.
onboarding_feature_st_desc: Full support for ST V2 formats: character cards, lorebooks, regex scripts, and prompt presets.
onboarding_slide_preset_desc: Glaze already has preinstalled presets (Shino, Fawnie, MicroCoT, Renri). You can use them for the best experience.
onboarding_preset_import_st_hint: ... or import your own SillyTavern-format preset
empty_lorebooks_desc: Create new or import from SillyTavern
desc_constant_disables_vector: Constant entries cannot use vector search. Enabling this disables vector search and removes the local index.
desc_vector_disabled_for_constant: Vector search is disabled for constant entries.
logic_and_any: AND Any (Has Primary AND Any Filter)
logic_and_all: AND All (Has Primary AND All Filters)
logic_not_any: NOT Any (Has Primary AND No Filters)
logic_not_all: NOT All (Has Primary AND Not All Filters)
placeholder_lore_content: The information to inject when keys match...
preset_create_import_desc: Create or import a new preset
preset_fawnie_desc: Remarkable for various styles based on real authors
preset_microcot_desc: Features a huge number of options covering any needs
preset_renri_desc: Featuring a unique narrator for fun and unique RP experience
hint_override_hierarchy: Chat overrides Character, which overrides Global
theme_preview_msg1:
Hello! How does this look?

"This is a reply to test the reply colors!"
And here are some italic thoughts.
theme_preview_msg2:
«Hello! How does this look?»
It looks great! The styling is perfect.
I'm so glad it works!
please_wait: Please wait, gathering and saving application data...
backup_hint_export: Create a full backup of your current application state.
backup_hint_import_tavo: Tavo (.tbk): characters, lorebooks, presets, chats, APIs, regex
cancel_import_done: Import cancelled. The database may be in a partial state — re-import to continue.
legacy_glz_rejected: Old Glaze backup format detected. Please re-export from the source app (Tavo, SillyTavern, or a recent Glaze Flutter build) to import successfully.
backup_success_desc: Restore successful! The app will now reload to apply changes.
desc_enter_to_send: Press Enter to send message. If disabled, Enter adds a new line. Applies only to physical keyboards.
desc_hide_msg_id: Hides the unique message identifier in the chat interface
desc_hide_gen_time: Hides the generation time statistics for AI messages
desc_hide_token_count: Hides token usage statistics attached to messages
desc_hide_help_tips: Hides contextual help buttons (?) across the app
desc_force_mobile: Overrides the desktop responsive layout and forces the mobile UI
desc_battery_saver_ui: Applies lower-animation, lower-update chat rendering regardless of desktop or mobile layout
desc_disable_swipe_regeneration: Disables regenerating messages by swiping left
desc_image_viewer: Changes the display of avatars when viewing
desc_chat_layout: Switch between bubbles or classic message layout
desc_dialog_grouping: Groups all sessions by character, sorted by latest message
imggen_tag_hint: AI must include tags to trigger generation:
imggen_send_char_avatar_desc: Use character's avatar as visual reference
imggen_send_user_avatar_desc: Use active persona's avatar as visual reference
imggen_image_context_desc: Include recently generated images as visual reference for new generations
imggen_save_hint: Save this image to your device
sync_no_providers_configured: Cloud sync is disabled in this build. Add OAuth keys in .env to enable Dropbox or Google Drive sign-in.
sync_hint_dropbox: Your data will be encrypted before upload. Only you can read it.
sync_encryption_setup: Set up encryption to protect your data in the cloud.
sync_auto_desc: Automatically sync after every N messages
sync_confirm_disconnect: Disconnect cloud sync? Your local data will remain intact.
sync_recovery_desc: Write down these 12 words and keep them safe. You will need them to decrypt your data on a new device. This phrase will NOT be shown again.
sync_restore_desc: Enter the 12-word recovery phrase from when you first set up encryption.
sync_invalid_phrase: Invalid recovery phrase. Check your 12 words and try again.
sync_confirm_pull: Download from cloud? Local data that is older will be overwritten.
sync_confirm_wipe: Delete ALL data from cloud? This cannot be undone. Your local data will remain intact.
sync_confirm_wipe_final: Are you sure? Type the provider name to confirm.
sync_gdrive_folder_not_found: No Glaze folder found in your Google Drive. Create a new one or link an existing folder.
sync_gdrive_link_hint: Open the folder in Google Drive, copy the URL or ID from the address bar, and paste it here.
sync_gdrive_checking: Checking Google Drive for Glaze folder...
sync_conflicts_hint: Choose which version to keep for each item.
sync_encryption_optional: Optionally encrypt your data before uploading to the cloud. Without encryption, data is stored as plain JSON.
sync_encryption_cloud_exists: Cloud data already exists. Restore your recovery phrase to decrypt it, or wipe cloud data first.
sync_hint_cloud_optional: Your data can be optionally encrypted before upload. Set up encryption after connecting.
sync_hint_cloud: Your data will be encrypted before upload. Only you can read it.
desc_sync_include_keys: Send provider API keys to cloud backup
desc_vector_search: Enable semantic search for lorebook entries
desc_use_llm_api: Use the same endpoint as LLM for embeddings
vector_reindex_desc: {count} vector entries were restored from sync without local embeddings. Run Index All to rebuild them.
desc_vector_search_entry: Match this entry by semantic similarity instead of keywords
desc_vector_search_replaces_keys: Keyword search is disabled — this entry uses vector similarity only
desc_vector_search_supplements_keys: Vector search supplements keyword matching (dual-channel retrieval)
desc_use_keyword_search: Enable dual-channel retrieval: both vector similarity and keyword matching (recommended)
vector_error_empty_text: Empty text for current embedding target
vector_error_invalid_response: Embedding API returned an invalid response
hint_lorebook_macro_override: Choose a per-entry insertion point, or Match Global to follow the lorebook default. {{lorebooks}} is now a valid entry target instead of a global override.
desc_show_reasoning: Shows reasoning_content. Doesn't affect model's reasoning.
catalog_imported_desc: {name} has been added to your library.
catalog_error_janitor_cloudflare: JanitorAI is behind Cloudflare and did not return the character. Try another provider like Janny, DataCat, or Chub.
catalog_extract_progress: DataCat is fetching the character from JanitorAI. This may take a minute.
catalog_provider_janitor_hint: Character library from Janitor.Ai (matches site content)
catalog_provider_datacat_hint: Third-party Janitor and Saucepan card library
desc_use_llm_api_memory: Use the same endpoint as LLM for memory book generation
catalog_nsfl_warning_desc: Trust me, you don't want to do this.
memory_books_search_type_note: Choose keyword retrieval, vector retrieval, or a combined mode for this session.
memory_books_no_embeddings: Embeddings are not configured, so vector search is unavailable.
memory_books_no_content: No content yet — click Generate to create
memory_books_no_entries: No memory entries in this session yet.
memory_books_drafts_need_gen: draft needs generation | drafts need generation
memory_books_endpoint_not_configured: Endpoint not configured. Set it in Generation Settings.
our_picks_hidden_toast: Our Picks has been hidden. You can restore it in settings.
our_picks_restore_hint: can be restored in app settings
desc_virtual_keyboard_send: Show Send button instead of Enter on virtual keyboards
desc_show_our_picks: Shows "Our Picks" card at the beginning of My Characters list
settings_enable_vector_desc: Enable semantic search for lorebook entries
settings_use_llm_api_desc: Use the same endpoint as LLM for embeddings
settings_err_endpoint_key: Enter endpoint and API key first
settings_err_fill_all: Fill endpoint, API key, and model
